'''Corann''' was a planet in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

This industrialized world was located along the edge of the Core Worlds, and was a target of [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] activities during the early stages of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
